LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL AND ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED FOR GOOD CAUSE SHOWN IN THE MOVING PAPERS. PLAINTIFF SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT FOR $20,159 PLUS COURT COSTS OF $873.61. calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Dismissal And Enter Judgment Under Stipulation
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL AND ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to enter judgment on stipulation is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment for $20,159 plus court costs of $873.61. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
